title: Place Jean Jaurès
excerpt: The main square of Saint-Étienne, a hub for markets and events in the heart of the city.

title: Museum of Art and Industry
excerpt: Discover ribbons, arms, and cycles that made Saint-Étienne famous across the world.

title: Firminy-Vert
excerpt: Le Corbusier's modernist ensemble: church, stadium, and housing unit in Firminy.

title: Parc de l'Europe
excerpt: A green lung in Saint-Étienne ideal for walking, jogging, and family picnics.

title: Saint-Chamond Town Hall
excerpt: Historic centre of Saint-Chamond with its emblematic belfry and pedestrian streets.

title: Rive-de-Gier Canal
excerpt: The Gier valley and its industrial heritage along the canal from Givors to Rive-de-Gier.
